    • stripContextPath

      public static Function<org.springframework.web.servlet.function.ServerRequest, org.springframework.web.servlet.function.ServerRequest> stripContextPath()
      Returns a filter function that strips the servlet context-path from the request URI. Users should add this filter before path-manipulating filters (StripPrefix, RewritePath, PrefixPath) when using server.servlet.context-path.
      Returns:
      a function that strips the context-path from the request URI

    • stripPrefix

      public static Function<org.springframework.web.servlet.function.ServerRequest, org.springframework.web.servlet.function.ServerRequest> stripPrefix()
